---
title: "Blog"
pagetitle: "Blog | Indra P. Acharja"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="section-header">
  <h1>Blog</h1>
  <p>Field notes, conservation reflections, and science communication.</p>
</div>

<p style="font-style:italic; color:#6b6458; font-size:0.96rem; margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
  Occasional writing on fieldwork in Bhutan, conservation challenges, and the science 
  behind saving the White-bellied Heron. Written for a broad audience.
</p>
```
